text:
First, note that time zones as we know them did not exist in 1591.  
But if we apply modern rules:  
- Europe/Paris is UTC+1 (standard time).  
- US/Mountain is UTC-7 (standard time).  
- Time difference: UTC-7 minus UTC+1 = -8 hours.  
- 21:00 on Oct 15 minus 8 hours = 13:00 on Oct 15.  

FINAL_ANSWER: 13:00
